caption:
They say the best lessons happen when the lights go out. 🕯️

The campus was empty, save for the hum of the library stacks. My favorite blazer was draped over the chair behind me, the silk blouse hugging every curve of my body beneath. A student lingered near the desk, eyes tracing my silhouette as if I were a textbook he couldn't put down. 

'Can you help me with this?' He whispered. His voice low, rough. I leaned in close, the scent of vanilla and ink filling the air. My skirt rode up slightly when I shifted, the fabric cool against warm skin. He didn't ask for the answer this time. He asked me to stay. 

The hallway light flickered, casting shadows that danced across my thighs. I adjusted the hem of my skirt, feeling the gaze on me, hungry and electric. We stayed until the moon climbed highest, teaching me everything worth remembering outside of these walls. 📚✨

#TeacherLife #UniversitySecrets #ChicStyle #LateNightVibes #CurvyTeacher #AlluringProf
